titleStmt.title: SII 22.143: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 143. (A.R. No. 143 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME PRĀKĀRA. RĀJARĀJADĒVA I—24th YEAR (A.D. 1008-9).

summary.p: The characters of the inscription seem to be later than the period of the king. This records an endowment of land at the hamlet Kuñjiramaṅgalam after purchase by a certain Vāśishṭaṉ Tiruvirāmaṉ Tiruvaraṅgaṉ of Iṟaiyānaraiyūr to the temple of Ūruḍaiya-Mahādēvar of the place to provide for offerings to god Amarabuyaṅgar-dēvar (?) during the three services in the temple.

Portion after line 24 does not seem to belong to this record. It mentions a grant of 120 kāśu to the temple by the chief Uttamaśōḻa-Milāḍu[ḍaiyār] for offerings to the god. With this amount the temple authorities are stated to have purchased a land inclusive of tax-payment.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tirumakaḷpolap peruṉilac celviyun taṉa
kke yurimaipūṇṭamai ma(ṉ)ṉak koḷḷa kāṉtaḷur
cālai kalamaṟuttaruḷik kaṅkapāṭiyun nuḷampapāṭiyum ta
ṭikaivaḻiyum kuṭamalaiṉāṭum kollamum kaliṅkamum vaṇṭamarpoḻil
vāko ciṟutuṟai Eṇṭicai pukaḻtaru Īḻamaṇṭalamum tiṇṭiṟal ve
ṉṟit taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa taṉ neḻil vaḷar Ūḻiyuḷ ḷellāv yāṇṭun
toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiñarait tecukoḷ śrīkovirāja rājakeśa
rivatmarāṉa śrī Irājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 4Āvatu malāṭāṉa jaṉa ṉātavaḷa
nāṭṭup pāṉūṟkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam tevatānam ci Iṟaiyānaraiyūr vāsiṣṭan tiruvarā
maṉ tiruvaraṅkaneṉ Ivvūruṭaiya mahādevarkku munṟu san=tikkum tiruvamutu dānamaṭ
ṭikkuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvūr vaṭapiṭākai kuñciramaṅkalattu śrī keraḷānta kap
periyerikiḻ naṉpāca nilam nāṉivvūr kauśikan caṅkaranārāyaṇaṉ pakkal nāṉ vilai
koṇṭuṭaiya talaippāṭakattu Oṉpatāṅ kūṟṟil vaṭakkaṭaiya pānipattuc
ceykkum kiḻpāṟkellai kaṇṇāṟṟu vāykkālukku meṟkun ten
pāṟkellai bhārgavan comacci centaṉilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟ
kellai kaṇṇāṟṟuvāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Eripperuṅ
kālukkut teṟkum Ivvicainta peruṉāṉkellaiyu ḷakappaṭṭa ṉilam pattuc ceyu
m Uṇṇilamoḻivinṟi muṟṟum Innilattu Akappaṭṭa kiṇaṟukaḷ muṟṟum Itanme
kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāṭikkiṇaṟum Ettamum Ettappaṇṇum Ettavāyk kālum Ivai
yittaṉaiyum peruvāykkālin vaṭakkilerukiṇaṟu maṟṟum Āka Iccuṭṭap paṭṭa Ittaṉaiyum
muṉṟu santikkun tiruvamutukku potuka nānāḻi Arici tiruvamutu ceyvikka Ippattuc
ceyyuṅ kiṇaṟukaḷ muṟṟu mikkuñciramaṅkalattu vaṭaceri Iccaṅkaranāraṇaṉ pakkal nā
ṉ vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya maṉai muṟṟum toṭṭamuṟṟuṅ kiṇaṟu muṟṟuṅ koṇṭu Uḷa
Amarapuyaṅkardevarkkut tiruvamutukku kuṭutten tiruvaraṅStops here.
The following piece though engraved in continuation of the above seems to be part of a different record.

—malaikoṇṭuṭaiya Eppeṟpaṭṭa Itum Ippūmi cuṭṭi māmañ
cāṭi koḷḷātitākavum Ittiruvamutukku Ivvuttamacoḻa malāṭu
ṭaiyār vaitta kācu nūṟṟirupatum Ikkācu nūṟṟirupatum Ippūmi
kku vilaitravyamum Iṟaitravyattukkumāka sabhaiyoṅ koṇṭu It tiruvaraṅkaṉ kecavan
pakkal sabhaivilaikoṇṭa naṉcai nilam pottakak kolāl kuḻi Onpatināyiratteṇ
ṇūṟṟorupatteṭṭe yaraikkāṟ kuḻiyum maṟṟum punceyum payanmaramum nattamuṅkiṇaṟu
kaḷum Uḷḷiṭṭu Ittaṉaiyum Iṟaikāttūṭṭāka Iccuṭṭappaṭṭa Ittaṉai yum Inta śrīkoyilil pirā
kkaṭam poṟampum paṭṭamum Araikkāl ponnukku meṟpaṭṭatu devar paṇṭāramāvatākavum
nikki niṉṟa pon nimantattoṭe yeṟuvatākavum Innilattil Uḻuk kuṭikaḷai I
nnilañcuṭṭi Erpponnum māmañcāṭiyun tiyeriyum Āka Ittaṉaiyum śrīkoyi
luṭaiyārkaḷ kaiyuṟṟu Innimantañ ceyvārkaḷākavum Ippacu nūṟ ṟiraṇṭuṅ kai
yyuṟṟa maṉṟāṭikaḷ pālamutum neyyamutum Aṭṭakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Ip paricu śantrātit
tavarai Innimantam panmāheśvara[ rakṣai]
Digital edition of SII 22.143 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
